name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The Koch brothers are targeting me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | We've seen this same song and dance from the Koch network and their web of dark money groups like Americans for Prosperity. Their intentions are clear: to rig our country further in favor of their corporate interests. They'll spend hundreds of millions of dollars in their endeavors -- as it turns out one of those endeavors is defeating me. | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e938/4080510535/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?refcode=sbe180529pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
**In 2016, the Kochs spent millions in Ohio.** They could very well do the same this year. So as much as I'd rather not send you messages like these, I have to.
[_**We 're only 48 hours away from the deadline for our first major goal of the election year and we're still short by $47,836. I'm asking you to rush in whatever you can Peter.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e938/4080510535/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?refcode=sbe180529pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e93f/4080510535/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180529pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e93f/4080510535/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180529pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e93f/4080510535/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180529pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e938/4080510535/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?refcode=sbe180529pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
We need to show the Koch network the full strength of our grassroots network. Especially at a time when my opponent is gaining ground and polls show this race tightening significantly.
If we show even the _slightest_ sign of weakness, the Kochs will know their spending is working.
And they'll make sure every major television station, radio network, and online page accessed by Ohio voters is covered in their lies and smears.
We're running out of time to hit our goal so we can show them our full strength. **But I 'm not running out of hope.**
With your help, we can still hit it in time. So before you tune out for the night, can you give? Every dollar gets us closer to this critical goal.
| | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac1/4462dc26/5c7ae63b/2007e938/4080510535/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTI5cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180529pm?refcode=sbe180529pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|

name: Senate Update (1)
subject: stakes are higher than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
From _The Washington Post_ to _POLITICO_ to Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ , the experts all agree: **Democrats** **_can _****take back the Senate, but ONLY if we win in Nevada.**

And with a new poll showing Democrat Jacky Rosen and GOP extremist Dean Heller _neck and neck_ , the stakes are higher than ever: **Whichever party controls the next Senate majority could determine the future of both Obamacare** _**and**_**the Supreme Court.**

**That's why the GOP is all in.** A Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC has vowed to spend MILLIONS, and Donald Trump promised to campaign in Nevada and is committed to defeating Jacky and keeping his Senate majority.

The only way we can fight back and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now - **but with just 72 hours until our huge end-of-month deadline, we're still falling way short of our must-hit $30,000 goal.**

**[Please, friends, we're counting on you to donate whatever you can spare ASAP to make sure we have the resources we need to defeat Donald Trump's candidate in Nevada and take back the Senate for Democrats:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3557/766431873/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY2MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk660-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3554/766431873/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY2MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk660-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3555/766431873/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY2MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk660-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3552/766431873/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY2MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk660-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3557/766431873/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY2MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk660-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3550/766431873/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3551/766431873/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd456/4fbb2af3/71b87b5d/5e8a3553/766431873/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

name: Kevin Gardner
subject: Jon Tester = anti-Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
Jon Tester has proven time and time again that all he wants to do in Washington is obstruct President Trump. Tester’s vote against CIA Director Gina Haspel was only the most recent vote in a long list of votes against President Trump. Remember, it was Jon Tester who:
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bftyyd-yhdyitiujj-r/)
---
Peter,
Jon Tester has proven time and time again that all he wants to do in Washington is obstruct President Trump.
Tester’s vote against CIA Director Gina Haspel was only the most recent vote in a long list of votes against President Trump.
Remember, it was Jon Tester who:
-> Voted to support illegal aliens over funding our military.
-> Voted against giving Montanans and Americans historic tax relief.
-> Voted against Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch.
-> Relied on smears and anonymous accusations to sink the nomination of Dr. Ronny Jackson to lead the VA. Accusations that the Secret Service has now proven were false.
**Jon Tester votes against President Trump at every single turn.**
[Help put an end to liberal Jon Tester’s reign in Washington. Help us raise $7,750 to fully fund our get-out-the-vote efforts and make sure Jon Tester doesn’t get another term!](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bftyyd-yhdyitiujj-y/)

[We can’t get there without your help. Please chip in now and help make sure we send Jon Tester into an early retirement!](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bftyyd-yhdyitiujj-h/)
Thank you,
Kevin Gardner

body:

Friend,

I want you to know just how hard President Trump is fighting for you.

As his Campaign Manager, I can tell you that he's working all hours, day and night, to deliver on EVERY solemn promise he made to you.

But now he needs your help. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in just 1 day, and we still have to raise $61,823.

name: The White House
subject: China has consistently taken advantage of America’s economy
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e0135652a253f820af1aa9c29ea507ecbcd1772cd661445d020a4b3b11f062741502c0e75348c723409ce5049d07ffbc980) The White House • May 30, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will sign the Right to Try Act, which will give terminally ill patients greater access to experimental treatments. [Watch live at 12:15 p.m. ET](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e0166ca2a6fa8d4cc099f884f92184f232c7678271f386f71366b030c14615573afd7234d898f8d05d0e4aa9f051f38eaa1).
---|---
• | The White House will host a celebratory "field day" to encourage youth sports participation and introduce intended appointees to the Presidential Council on Sports, Fitness, and Nutrition. [Watch live at 3:30 p.m. ET](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e0166ca2a6fa8d4cc099f884f92184f232c7678271f386f71366b030c14615573afd7234d898f8d05d0e4aa9f051f38eaa1).

---
|

## China has consistently taken advantage of America's economy
**For many years, China has used unfair trade and industrial practices** --including "dumping," discriminatory barriers, forced technology transfer, over capacity, and industrial subsidies--that champion Chinese firms and make it impossible for many U.S. firms to compete on a level playing field.
**The costs of these policies to American industry keep piling up** :
• | China's intellectual property theft costs U.S. innovators billions of dollars each year
---|---
• | China accounts for 87 percent of the counterfeit goods seized coming into America
• | Beijing has banned imports of U.S. agricultural products such as poultry, cutting off America's ranchers and farmers
• | The United States charges a 2.5 percent tariff on Chinese cars, while China maintains a 25 percent tariff on cars from America
**President Trump has taken long overdue action** to address the source of the problem. Part of the solution includes imposing a 25 percent tariff on $50 billion of goods imported from China that contain industrially significant technology, including those related to the "Made in China 2025" program. The Administration is also implementing specific investment restrictions and enhanced export controls.
[More: "From now on, we expect trading relationships to be fair and to be reciprocal."](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e015513112e04019f5a2bc7577c1cff0beb9e75a01f672accccb5c1deb48e35964057f40b647c9d6d410d94e2f6f424ebfb)

---
|

## Video: Welcome home, Josh Holt!
**Over Memorial Day weekend, President Trump greeted another released American**. Late Saturday, the President welcomed Josh Holt to the Oval Office following Holt's return from a Venezuelan prison.
**With Holt home, 17 Americans held abroad have been released during the Trump Administration**. "The United States thanks the Maduro regime for releasing the unjustly detained United States citizen, Joshua Holt, and his Venezuelan wife," Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said in a statement. His return "does not change United States policy" toward Venezuela.
[Watch President Trump welcome Josh Holt home in the Oval Office.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e0195d289fa7507982c50fb6b6c0d4f5400e2be09b6836d0c7f9d31f1771e5fdd73dfc9ed205e913713c14f8eaeb519f506)
**More** : [The President's full remarks ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e017120d9598ed668d6323197e0bd0f336af33ede8dbc9c491b36eb799a2532b792762e90b8630e3e2acea04691f814030c)

---
|

## Federal employment must be earned, not given
**Firing bad Federal employees is prohibitively difficult**. It takes 6 months to a year to remove a tenured Federal employee for poor performance--plus an average of 8 more months to resolve appeals. Such employees are _44 times_ less likely to get fired or laid off than private-sector workers.
**Through an Executive Order, President Trump is making changes** to strengthen the merit system and streamline the removal of poor performers. As part of the new policy, agencies will be required to report information on the disciplinary actions and management of poor performers to the Office of Personnel Management for publication.
[Learn more about how President Trump is reforming the Civil Service for the American people. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e011f30905c08216e6c91353878a4ea750cb0e2ac8ea3e835efccb3560c0b266d3c3c969d801e2ece8f7ebaf9ac7ad880b3)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump participates in a Memorial Day ceremony** | May 28, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e01c3509bd776aee59c788156b8bb80a08c34c8dcc9f4790bb45ebcb09a934a864b6c3aa169b1f160abd946b6595287d041) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbd1e47e71205e01939e5932b26882d8c947f579efb3ff125595beb8282afef8b4a49ce8c49353dda684d324e64239f30d41e82ce7acd662) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43bbceb839018cd7e53f5356a5e07fbdbbf6e3e58f45ae321c99359221ab3f33f329cb55a2cec7c7ff58afbf3602c3c31833acf028b921d6b)
---

name: Khizr Khan
subject: If my son were still here today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Like many immigrants, I came to this country empty handed -- but I believed in American democracy.
---
I am a patriotic American Muslim with undivided loyalty to our country, Derek.

Like many immigrants, I came to this country empty handed -- but I believed in the American dream. So did many others who sacrificed their lives defending this country.

If my son, U.S. Army Capt. Humayun Khan, was still here today, he would be appalled by Donald Trump and his hateful agenda. Trump has done nothing but smear the character of Muslims, try to build walls to divide us, and threaten the democratic values my son and many other immigrants died protecting.

**Tomorrow the Democratic Party faces an important fundraising deadline. Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before then to elect Democrats nationwide who will defend our values?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ec8/4067b0a/5aba04f9e/7fb958eb/3114877263/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&source=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&refcode=em_20180530_kk_nd_b")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ec8/4067b0a/5aba04f9e/7fb958f6/3114877263/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&source=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&refcode=em_20180530_kk_nd_b")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ec8/4067b0a/5aba04f9e/7fb958f7/3114877263/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kk-may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&source=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&refcode=em_20180530_kk_nd_b")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ec8/4067b0a/5aba04f9e/7fb958f4/3114877263/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&source=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&refcode=em_20180530_kk_nd_b")
** Many patriots like my son are buried in the Arlington National Cemetery -- people of all faiths, genders, and ethnicities who died defending our country. They gave their lives for our country's ideals. We cannot let this president and his party trample on those ideals any more than they already have.

We must elect Democrats in November who will stand up to the Trump administration and its terrible, harmful policies.

**[Don't take November's election lightly: Chip in $3 to help elect Democrats who will fight for the future of every American.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ec8/4067b0a/5aba04f9e/7fb958f5/3114877263/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kk-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Dont+take+Novembers+election+lightly+Chi&utm_campaign=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&source=em_20180530_kk_nd_b&refcode=em_20180530_kk_nd_b")**

Thank you,

Khizr Khan

name: Ohio Senate Alert
subject: read before you leave for work Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | It's just one thing after another this month. **FIRST,** a poll showed that Congressman Jim Renacci is within striking distance of Sherrod. **THEN,** the Koch-backed group Americans for Prosperity targeted Sherrod as part of their SIX-FIGURE digital ad buy. **NOW,** Americans for Prosperity is going up with ads and sending mailers to Ohio families praising Renacci in the hopes it will push him ahead of Sherrod! [_**If that all wasn 't bad enough, we're going to miss the biggest goal of the general election to date if we don't raise $35,201 in the next 24 hours. Please, give what you can:**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee3a/3678968944/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530?refcode=sbe180530_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee39/3678968944/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180530_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee39/3678968944/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180530_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee39/3678968944/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180530_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee3a/3678968944/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530?refcode=sbe180530_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** We really wish we had better news to share with you, but we're running out of time to hit our goal. If we fall short now, Renacci could pull ahead. He's been bragging that he has what it takes to defeat Sherrod and cement Ohio as a "Trump state."_**If we miss our goals, he gets one step closer to accomplishing that.**_ Then Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and the Kochs would know that their efforts were working -- and they would go all-out to make sure Sherrod couldn't recover. The stakes are high. Even if it's just $5, every single contribution gets us closer to our goal: **[https://www.sherrodbrown.com/MayGoal](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffac5/4462dc26/539ff9e8/2007ee38/3678968944/VEsC/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/MayGoal")** Thank you, Team Sherrod
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Fight back: Add your name to repeal the Trump tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
During the campaign, Trump promised to make life better for working-class Americans. The Trump tax plan breaks that promise in a dozen different ways. | |
---
Thanks again for joining the team, friend! When I talk to working people in my district, none of them say "Hey Tim, can you give huge tax breaks to billionaires and corporations, and make the rest of us pay for it?" But that's exactly what Republicans did when they passed the Trump tax plan last year. **During the 2016 campaign, Trump promised to make life better for working-class Americans. The Trump tax plan breaks that promise in a dozen different ways.** That's why I'm fighting harder than ever to take back the House, so we can pass a tax plan that works for ALL of us, not just the Donald Trumps of the world. [Will you stand with me to repeal the Trump tax plan and replace it with tax reform that puts working people first?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b77/3053423863/VEsH/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-the-trump-tax?source=unmsg20180530_adsorg_wmup1") [Add your name ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b76/3053423863/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/add-your-name-repeal-the-trump-tax?source=unmsg20180530_adsorg_wmup1") Thank you for your support and welcome to the team, \-- Tim Ryan

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b79/3053423863/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b78/3053423863/VEsC/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b7b/3053423863/VEsD/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b7a/3053423863/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b7d/3053423863/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b79/3053423863/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92b9/5486deaa/28adb636/dcc1b78/3053423863/VEsP/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Roy Cooper
subject: November is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035b3/2fde7c66/465fce6b/15683cdc/2505177312/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_867&refcode=em18_180529_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Hello,

If you had any questions on why we need to break the Republican supermajority in the legislature, these last few weeks should sum it up.

When teachers marched in Raleigh for more respect and better pay, Republican legislators turned their backs with one of them calling the teachers "thugs." And instead of funding better teacher pay, they protected their tax breaks for corporations and people making over $200,000 per year.

When it came time to put together the state's budget, they did so in secret with no chance for any amendments from any Democratic legislators. They're shutting out constituents from all over North Carolina from having any voice in the discussion.

**That's why we need to Break the Majority. And we can do that with your help. Will you help us reach our goal of raising $15,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035b3/2fde7c66/465fce6b/15683cdf/2505177312/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180529-cooper-mayeom?gpsid=8_43_867&refcode=em18_180529_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_campaign=em18_180529_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=2+-++ask++raquo")

North Carolinians deserve great teachers who are paid fairly for their hard work. They deserve safer schools and updated classrooms.

They deserve a legislature that isn't concerned with playing partisan political games, but with making real progress and moving North Carolina forward.

Under the current leadership, this legislature has failed time and time again, and the people of North Carolina deserve better.

[**Together, we have a chance to make a difference. Roy

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen for Senate
subject: “Philbert”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
If you’ve seen the news this morning, you know Donald Trump was in Tennessee last night campaigning.
_(And you probably know by now he called Governor Bredesen “Philbert” -- whatever that means -- and said he has no idea who he is. The good news is that Tennesseans do know Phil Bredesen--all 95 counties voted for him the last time he ran.)_
Here’s what Tennesseans know to be true: Governor Bredesen has a track-record of working with Democrats and Republicans to get things done for the people of Tennessee -- whether it was balancing budgets, saving the state’s Medicaid program, or reining in out-of-control spending.
Now we’re not going to sit here and let hyper-partisan attacks distract us from what matters: doing right by the people of Tennessee.
Governor Bredesen has made it clear that if President Trump proposes something that’s good for Tennessee, then he’ll support it. Likewise, if the president suggests something that’s bad for Tennesseans, then he’ll oppose it.
**That’s what senators ought to do.**
[**Right now we need your help to win this thing: can you add a donation of $15 or whatever you can to support our grassroots campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1307638/7174810/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTk3Zi0yOTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PLijvWTYoLz0lVOY49BwE06s0gsL-XzOFoEiEiPgeo=&refcode=em180530-eom1-full&emci=42070c14-1d64-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=7ec0e97f-2964-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1307639/7174811/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTk3Zi0yOTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PLijvWTYoLz0lVOY49BwE06s0gsL-XzOFoEiEiPgeo=&refcode=em180530-eom1-full&emci=42070c14-1d64-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=7ec0e97f-2964-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)
Hyper-partisan attacks won’t create jobs or solve the opioid epidemic. It’s just going to divide people and make it harder to get anything done.
**Our campaign is open to anyone who is tired of the partisan squabbling and wants to bring common sense leadership to Washington. That makes us a very different kind of campaign and it’s why people are really paying attention to what we’re doing here in Tennessee.**
So instead of getting distracted today, Governor Bredesen is hitting the campaign trail in West Tennessee at the groundbreaking of a site that will bring thousands of jobs to a small community thanks to his work as governor. That is who Phil Bredesen is.
[**Contribute $15 or whatever you can now before Thursday’s deadline to help us win this thing and bring real change to Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1307640/7174812/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTk3Zi0yOTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PLijvWTYoLz0lVOY49BwE06s0gsL-XzOFoEiEiPgeo=&refcode=em180530-eom1-full&emci=42070c14-1d64-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=7ec0e97f-2964-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1307641/7174813/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTk3Zi0yOTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PLijvWTYoLz0lVOY49BwE06s0gsL-XzOFoEiEiPgeo=&refcode=em180530-eom1-full&emci=42070c14-1d64-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=7ec0e97f-2964-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)
We will not let partisan politics get in the way of what’s best for Tennessee.
Thanks for all you do.
Bob Corney
Bredesen for Senate
Campaign Manager
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1307642/7174814/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWMwZTk3Zi0yOTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PLijvWTYoLz0lVOY49BwE06s0gsL-XzOFoEiEiPgeo=&refcode=em180530-eom1-full&emci=42070c14-1d64-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=7ec0e97f-2964-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: When -- not if
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fkurOjoTf2eCFUAhviD3zj-Cx_XL3RiG8200Cxstqqo=/WwBh1PIIQBqINJdkr0JZ50hx8ZGkxzV9VtOMG2-g0mY=) Friends and Neighbors -- One of the primary responsibilities of the office of Florida Chief Financial Officer is to make sure your hard earned tax dollars are being spent in the way you were assured - repeatedly - they would be. The CFO is also the state's chief insurance regulator and is responsible for making sure that consumers are protected. Unfortunately, the policies of Governor Scott and the current CFO have transferred all risk to consumers. And, while that might mean lower insurance rates for some now, it isn't good for anyone in the future. **It 's all just a question of when -- not if.** _When_ another hurricane environmental disaster or storm -- such as Hurricane Maria or Tropical Storm Alberto -- strikes, Florida consumers, **their homes and their livelihoods, will, once again, be the proverbial sitting ducks in its wake.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fkurOjoTf2eCFUAhviD3zj-Cx_XL3RiG8200Cxstqqo=/Ki3iJFf8JI9BSE3dr6w6_vKwZm1NPn5-WtFlV91Zz7w=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help Jeremy protect Florida. Chip in $3.](https://act.myngp.com/el/fkurOjoTf2eCFUAhviD3zj-Cx_XL3RiG8200Cxstqqo=/Ki3iJFf8JI9BSE3dr6w6_vKwZm1NPn5-WtFlV91Zz7w=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) What Florida needs is an insurance environment that works for everyone -- those who live on the coast, those who live inland and the insurance companies. We shouldn't be chasing insurance companies out of the state -- we need a competitive marketplace. **That 's where I'll come in.** As your next CFO, I will help make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or whatever Mother Nature - and climate change - may have in store for us. But I have an election to win first - and a crucial end of month fundraising goal to meet tomorrow. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $3 or more before midnight tomorrow, to help me make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or natural disaster?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fkurOjoTf2eCFUAhviD3zj-Cx_XL3RiG8200Cxstqqo=/Ki3iJFf8JI9BSE3dr6w6_vKwZm1NPn5-WtFlV91Zz7w=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Laney A. (Digital Director)
subject: We have to make a statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi, it's so nice to finally introduce myself.

My name is Laney Austin, and I'm the Digital Director on Senator Klobuchar's campaign. I'm part of this team because I know it's *so* important to make sure we keep Amy working hard for us in the Senate.

You probably saw Amy's note yesterday about the upcoming DFL convention, and how we're setting an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 before Friday. **We 're setting this goal to make a statement.** **[Stand with Amy and make a donation now>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NhF1ZD1z6J6z8ouwt%2BKjstoWnr5Tug%2F3)**
We have to show that we're ready to work hard and stand up for policies that tackle climate change, lower prescription drug costs, and protect our democracy. Amy understands this, and she's working everyday making a difference for Minnesotans.

**Can you help show everyone that we 're ready and we've got Amy's back? Contribute now!
**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2Fadt7ciAHhDRv4CLxVzv99oWnr5Tug%2F3)**

**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pBSnfMbKpjU5sSfa6SRnTNoWnr5Tug%2F3)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wsmgNgj2uFbEIso2UFw7OdoWnr5Tug%2F3)**

Thanks,
Laney A.

P.S. -- If you're new to Minnesota politics, the "DFL" is our state's Democratic party and it stands for Democratic-Farmer-Labor!

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: This is a long email (but you should read it)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This isn't how the DNC has functioned in the past -- plain and simple. Our strategy used to revolve around presidential cycles, but that's no longer the case.
---
The DNC is doing things differently this year -- plain and simple.

Our strategy used to revolve around presidential cycles, but I can tell you firsthand that our party is now committed to organizing 365 days a year in all 50 states. We can't win if we don't compete, and we can't compete if we don't organize.

Tomorrow is a critical fundraising deadline. Each contribution made before the deadline will help Democrats mobilize voters across the country. Can you make your first donation of 2018 before midnight tomorrow?

**Contribute $3 right now -- ahead of tomorrow's important deadline -- to say you are ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c08/2454749144/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c09/2454749144/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c16/2454749144/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c17/2454749144/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c14/2454749144/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c15/2454749144/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")
** I want to be perfectly clear: Our wins in places like Virginia, Alabama, and western Pennsylvania the past year have been the result of good old-fashioned grassroots organizing. That kind of work doesn't happen overnight, and it certainly doesn't happen without investment.

You may already know that the DNC has launched four programs that will help transform the way our party engages with voters and communities across the country while staying true to our commitment to effective organizing. Before I get into the details, I need to make one thing clear: The only way these programs will work is if tens of millions of Democrats nationwide join together to help them succeed.

**Every ZIP Code Counts** is our party's commitment to organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018, 2019 and beyond. The DNC is investing $10,000 in every state party in the country every month to help with this effort. By working at the local level, we are strengthening our state parties and ensuring they have the resources to win elections.

**Winning with Partners in 2018** is a program launched by Deputy Chair Keith Ellison knowing that the DNC is one organization that is part of a broader movement committed to electing Democrats. Through a series of town hall meetings across the country, we're pulling together state party leaders, community activists, and organizations new and old. By listening to people on the ground, we are discovering common goals and better mobilizing our communities this year and in the years ahead.

**The IWillVote campaign** is an ambitious plan to reach 50 million voters by November. When more people vote, Democrats win! The four components of this program are: 1) getting our community to commit to vote, 2) ensuring they are registered to vote, 3) providing voter education and protection, and 4) running a get-out-the-vote campaign.

**The Best Practices Institute** is an innovation and training hub to support candidates and state parties. We are investing in creative solutions while focusing on the proven best practices that will help develop a permanent infrastructure to continue our progress in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

Right now, Democrats are moving full steam ahead to win back seats in the House -- but that will only happen if we help our candidates across the country mobilize voters, starting today. **You haven't contributed to the Democratic Party yet this year, but with you on our team I know Democrats will be unstoppable. Can I count on you to make your first donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline?**

**[Donate $3 before tomorrow's deadline and together we'll build the organizing infrastructure to win in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c12/2454749144/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Donate++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+max&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. I have no doubt that Democrats can win anywhere. All we need to do is organize. **[If you're ready to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c13/2454749144/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+If+youre+ready+to+elect+Democrats+up+and&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd")**

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c10/2454749144/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c11/2454749144/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c1e/2454749144/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522edf/4067b0a/5aa68fc65/7fb94c1f/2454749144/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180530_abl_nd&source=em_20180530_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180530_abl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Andy Bakker, AustinPetersen.com
subject: 80% to our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Quick update on our goal. Yesterday, we had around 100 people contribute to the campaign, so we’re roughly 80% to getting 1,000 online donors this month! As the field director for the campaign, I can personally tell you that your donations are having an impact on the race. We are calling thousands of Missouri GOP voters and even converting Josh Hawley supporters to our side. A lot of people just aren’t aware that Hawley is a fake conservative and that Austin is a true liberty candidate. But we need to scale our efforts to win. Friend, any donation you make will be used to take down Josh Hawley and spread Austin’s message of liberty. Let me make this clear - We are on the path to victory. But it’s not going to happen without your help. I would love to tell Austin that I found another 25 or 35 donors in the next few hours. Can you chip in? [**Please click here to donate $500, $250, $100, $50, $35, $20.18 or $10 >>>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D053018_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053018_fr&n=1) Some people ask me, “Well, I can only donate $5. Does that really make a difference?”. The answer is **YES!** Again, these dollars are being used to contact voters and mobilizing them to vote for Austin. [**So even if you can only donate $5 or $10 please make a donation to the campaign today >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D053018_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053018_fr&n=2) It is so inspiring to see how many people have stepped up to support Austin’s campaign. We are growing every day and it is difficult to manage the hundreds (yes, I mean hundreds) of volunteers that are making calls and contacting voters. We need more people like Rand Paul and Mike Lee in the U.S. Senate. Austin may be our only shot this year. This is the most important campaign for the liberty movement in 2018. Please make an urgent contribution to the campaign. Thank you, Friend. Andy Bakker
Field Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053018_fr&n=3))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

[Privacy Policy](http://www.austinpetersen.com/privacy?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053018_fr&n=4) | [Unsubscribe](http://www.austinpetersen.com/unsubscribe?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=053018_fr&n=5)

name: Ryan Furlong
subject: A scary thought to wake up to:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have to keep fighting back. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b6a1/c1f7015/68556733/11429346/1251648814/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&utm_campaign=eom-2&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I woke up to a pretty scary press release earlier this month from the National Republican Senatorial Committee: _NRSC launches digital ads urging Haspel confirmation_ One of the senators they targeted? You guessed it: Tina. Tina stood strong against the Haspel confirmation, and she was attacked for it. This is a sign: Republicans are already starting to pour money into the state to try to buy this seat back for the GOP, but you and I know what's at stake. We need someone who stands up to Donald Trump's dangerous nominations, not someone who caves to him. His cabinet is a revolving door; who knows who he'll oust next -- and who knows which extremist he'll nominate to replace them? [**That's why we need to keep Tina in the Senate: Donate $10 or more today to help us raise $12,500 by tomorrow night.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b6a1/c1f7015/68556733/11429346/1251648814/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&utm_campaign=eom-2&utm_medium=ema") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b6a1/c1f7015/68556733/11429347/1251648814/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&utm_campaign=eom-2&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Tina is hearing from Minnesotans day after day about why they're scared of Donald Trump's agenda and the people who are helping him implement it.
It seems like every morning we wake up to a new headline that sounds like a plot line from _The Handmaid's Tale_.
Tina's been fighting for folks like you and me -- we can be sure her opponent Karin Housley won't. So if you want to keep pushing back against Donald Trump's dangerous agenda, you know what you have to do.
[**Fund the fight by donating $10 or more before tomorrow's big fundraising deadline.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b6a1/c1f7015/68556733/11429346/1251648814/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-eom-smith?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-2&utm_campaign=eom-2&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Ryan

Tina Smith for Senate

name: Regina Bateson
subject: six days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Peter,
Six days.
That’s all we have left to talk to voters and change minds before the primary. All the political pundits are saying that this is an incredibly narrow race, and for once, they are right.
This race is going to be decided by what we can accomplish before next Tuesday. I don’t know about you, but I want to leave it all out on the field. Will you help me get across the finish line with a contribution today towards our critical primary deadline? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=25&recurring=AUTO ]
Our path forward hasn’t always been easy. Creating lasting change in America never is. But together, we are a part of a grassroots campaign we should be very proud of. We are running on people power, rather than the power of special interests. On June 6th we want the news to be talking about how we won the day, not about how we barely fell short. Contribute today to make sure our movement finishes strong! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
It has been a true honor to make this journey with you. Now let’s go out, win this primary, and give CA-04 the change we deserve!
Yours,
Regina

name: kate.ramstad
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
Did you see what Governor Raimondo just announced?
She's bringing more offshore wind energy to Rhode Island -- enough wind turbines to power more than 200,000 homes in our state!
This just-announced investment in clean energy will create hundreds of new jobs and get us nearly 70% of the way towards our clean energy goal of 1000 megawatts by 2020.
This is huge, friend, but Gina can't see this project through without your support. **[Will you chip in $10 now to give Gina four more years and ensure Rhode Island continues to lead the nation in offshore wind energy?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0d1/5e076a9e/54550ffe/14426340/3312032344/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gmr-wind?refcode=180530")**

Kate

name: Amy O'Rourke
subject: We can't be a runner-up for those who are counting on us to help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Dear friends,
It's been over a month since I have been able to join Beto on the road, and I can honestly say I am missing it. I have been overloaded with my own work and being the sole caregiver during the chaos of the kids' end-of-year activities. It has left me feeling a little disconnected from the campaign. I am realizing that, much like Beto, I feel most optimistic and engaged when I see and feel the energy of those that we are meeting across the state.
In the midst of that more difficult stretch, I hosted a phone bank at our campaign headquarters in El Paso. I was so focused on the 10-15 minute intro that I was supposed to give (always nervous to speak publicly) that I was actually dreading the event a little. That night, though, completely changed my spirits. In many ways, it was like the first day getting back on the road with Beto.
_Amy hosting a phone bank in El Paso._
Based on the Facebook RSVPs, I expected a familiar crowd of volunteers who have regularly helped since our City Council days, but when I walked into a room of 60 people, I probably only knew five. As I walked around the room introducing myself, person after person told me that they were there because Beto and his team had fought for them and their needs, and now they needed to step up and fight for him and our state. Most had never participated in a political event, let alone the less-than-glamorous phone banking.
With the help of our excellent field team, each person received hands-on support in learning the system, made some calls, and agreed to come back that Saturday to do more. All I needed to pull myself out of the rut I was in was to surround myself with people on the front lines of this campaign -- people who are sacrificing their own time to take action each and every day. It put all of this in perspective, and it makes all the hardship worthwhile. This campaign is not on any single person or any single community. It's on all of us -- and by getting out there and doing more, I realized I will personally be better for it, and Texas will be better for it too.
**We have a little more than five months left in this campaign.** As I told the group at the phone bank, we have to do everything we can to make this happen in 2018. We are not running this race to close the gap in Texas or make the state lean a little more blue. There is no second place. We can't be a runner-up for those who are counting on us to help.
A big part of that is meeting each goal along the way -- whether that be the number of doors knocked, phones called, or grassroots donations raised. I hope that everyone will find that same sense of purpose and community that I felt after the El Paso phone bank, and that you will encourage everyone to do everything in their power to make victory a reality.
Thanks for being there for us,
Amy
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92171/3b1d797/7db206a1/35a84648/205836377/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1805-eom?refcode=ema180530-EOM6&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92171/3b1d797/7db206a1/35a84649/205836377/VEsE/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92171/3b1d797/7db206a1/35a8464a/205836377/VEsF/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92171/3b1d797/7db206a1/35a8464b/205836377/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: This could devastate Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | These days, you can't turn on the news without seeing some ridiculous Trump tweet or breaking scandal in the administration. Important stories get shoved on the back burner. But there's one I need you to keep your eye on before the pot boils over. _The Trump administration is yet AGAIN going after women's reproductive rights._ As one media outlet put it: **"Behind the scenes, Mike Pence's quiet push to end abortion and limit women's rights is succeeding."** The administration's rule will deny Title X funds to clinics like Planned Parenthood. It will limit access to vital services. And it will disproportionately affect low-income women and families. Pence and Trump might want to keep this hush-hush. **That 's why we must speak out and double our efforts to stop them from denying vital health services to millions of women. ** As you know, I will fight with everything I have to stop this administration from defunding Planned Parenthood. _I need you with me now more than ever._ [**_Chip in $5, $10, or more to show this administration that we are a strong, united front fighting for the issues that matter -- including and especially the right of women to access quality affordable medical care that they need._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fdd/622b7b5b/1aeee8d4/307b82be/4203873867/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180524c?refcode=dwse180524c_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for standing with me today. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

Friend,
**We are running out of time to gather the necessary resources to win this district.**
**We are behind in fundraising for the month and desperately could use your help:[ We still need to reach 126 more contributions by 11:59 PM TOMORROW.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xwsqow2-PkkYgMzTAW-Fz_qHmqb48LKl2a0hdykN5eM=/pQt0X9sosNrBMiZJbhfkvFswCC7hPqW3B5neBznl7eA=?refcode=May-30-We-could-not-have-gotten-this-far-without-you)**
It's critical we come together if we are going to stop this administration and Republican-controlled Congress from tearing down additional healthcare, immigration, gun safety, and environmental protections.
Constituents in this congressional district deserve better than what their current representative is delivering. The civil rights of immigrant communities are being violated more and more, and healthcare premiums are set to rise by 16.9% next year (over $1011.00 per person).
Will you join the grassroots campaign we are building?
[**Be one of our final 126 donors so we can cross this fundraising finish line and close out the month with significant momentum.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xwsqow2-PkkYgMzTAW-Fz_qHmqb48LKl2a0hdykN5eM=/pQt0X9sosNrBMiZJbhfkvFswCC7hPqW3B5neBznl7eA=?refcode=May-30-We-could-not-have-gotten-this-far-without-you)
We could not have gotten this far without you -- please keep up your support!
**\- Mary**

name: Team Lipinski
subject: we care what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/td_-UUjBXdQPGkWWatyxeqg8F_mjNmWDdQGOCJy75-U=/0kTQXgBzi8NyGXhb77uP_h7B_mkT48o8O916XW8SJss=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Peter,

We recently surveyed our grassroots supporters to find out which issues are most important to them. First, a huge thank you to everyone who participated.

**We learned that _fighting climate change_ , _improving our educational system_ , and _supporting seniors_ are at the very top of supporters' lists.**

**Dan has been a breakaway leader on ALL THREE of these key issues for over a decade!**

His work has led to the protection and restoration of local lands and waters, pushed critical environmental regulations and climate-change responses to new heights, strengthened Illinois schools, and gave seniors the security they needed and deserved.

[**But right now, he needs your help to continue that critical work! Will you make a contribution to Dan 's campaign right now, before the deadline tonight at midnight? We need to raise $9,500 to keep our fundraising on track, and we still have over $7k to go.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/td_-UUjBXdQPGkWWatyxeqg8F_mjNmWDdQGOCJy75-U=/0kTQXgBzi8NyGXhb77uP_h7B_mkT48o8O916XW8SJss=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Probably our biggest surprise from the survey was learning that most people aren't aware that Dan's opponent, Art Jones, is a Holocaust denier.

Jones is a proud neo-Nazi and white supremacist, and he doesn't hide his belief in dangerous, despicable and racist ideologies. He's running to advance the white-supremacist agenda. As the head of the Illinois Republican Party said, Jones "is a Nazi whose disgusting, bigoted views have no place in our nation's discourse."

With your support now, we can get our positive message out to voters, share the work that Dan has done for Illinois, and send a strong warning about who our opponent really is.

[**Click here to give and help us reach this important goal. We have only 48 more hours to raise $9,500, so please act fast!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/td_-UUjBXdQPGkWWatyxeqg8F_mjNmWDdQGOCJy75-U=/0kTQXgBzi8NyGXhb77uP_h7B_mkT48o8O916XW8SJss=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks,

Team Lipinski

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/td_-UUjBXdQPGkWWatyxeqg8F_mjNmWDdQGOCJy75-U=/0kTQXgBzi8NyGXhb77uP_h7B_mkT48o8O916XW8SJss=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_1_1&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

name: Team Donnelly
subject: three quick things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Unaccountable Washington-based GOP groups, including Karl Rove's super PAC, are dumping TONS of money into Indiana |
---

| | Hey Peter -- just three quick things:
1. **Our first end-of-month deadline of the general election is TOMORROW** , and Joe recorded a short video to let everyone know how critical it is that we hit our 1,100 new donors goal. [**Watch it, and then chip in before midnight tomorrow HERE >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2c/3699433409/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=10")

2. **Unaccountable Washington-based GOP groups, including Karl Rove's super PAC, are dumping TONS of money into Indiana** to try and replace Joe with Rep. Braun, who got rich by cheating workers at his trucking company and used his position in the legislature to lower his own taxes while raising them for fellow Hoosiers.

3. **But you can help us stop Rep. Braun and the super PACs! Will you pitch in before midnight tomorrow to help us out-organize Rep. Braun in all 92 counties? >>**

| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2f/3699433409/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2e/3699433409/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e29/3699433409/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e28/3699433409/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2b/3699433409/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?refcode=20180530.1nd")**
Thanks,
Team Donnelly

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Joe Donnelly
Subject: Thursday

Team,

With the general election in full swing, the Koch brothers and Karl Rove have increased their attacks on me. But we're fighting back with people power -- by setting a 1,100 new donor end-of-month goal.

**I recorded a short video from the RV to emphasize how important this goal is in helping us spread our commonsense message.[Will you give it a look and then chip in to help us go door-to-door in all 92 counties? >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2c/3699433409/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=10")**
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21f2/7377f838/3fe7a3c7/51f90e2c/3699433409/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-eommayvidnd?refcode=20180530.1nd&amount=10")
---
We know we're not going to be able to match Rep. Braun and his GOP allies dollar for dollar. But every donation gives us a greater chance to open another field office, hire another organizer, and get our message to every voter in every county. **So, can you contribute $5, or $20, or even $500? I 'm grateful for anything you can send. >>**

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=L_qbroz9ntt1zFTbvqlJvjBJkuVeM2m0PLxcmKdCrc_h-QUa2__d3DQo1WaiHN_KbniEsNpGkt3KRHgTn0j-aqC3yhu5-2OXEsharsRk6cdgV5Bhrp6Fx1k5ECtpCwJkfZxsgMI0smxpoywtc0y0kt3c4O6cehYU1RNixlgV10Y_ABpdoinq0udSw2darocc8r80hzGH-Wmxk37kHo9U9YaeEXG62UMJ9sCwKO9XJAxNhpgcXFN_1ewjXoNz2B_Q). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCKV2hFxydKeMI2IsV27Hkb9OdyeL0QpxsE7UxTf4KDCtZ6BKZ6zUGdVcUJ2czR3FSE-keKc81PWKXF2gpuucAtBKbZ4D246Db8h2e4VnX23yfXkiap__7T638qgadIpkSPeiNeuvgzxQDcMzsb65XxXcXjleE0jQMreKhZiQ-n1kF1mEYlCAj6SSEQ4JwExGegyEToiv5L79UrOAvwWtcPBiTGUzaSEO3OcstX-xIpUIENAfxj9drQEIxivsNVoPbtZpFlLgRKTirZBnqICkXsmv9eyCJvoPidGbNWzSubMNUhO6OboxFl0S0_14aMTVIGT_Q2hNXR7tcfa84i4lqIqijYH8TGgOkKWK76okCbv0) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCKV2hFxydKeMI2IsV27Hkb9vpJBy6dewaFSkMUPSQjFfHWHZskOVCcQKvDQdHHfSpeiSuhem7OoTGeuTFa-UZoxMSoYhVQWnwCl0PB7JLdl1275yyRMIfbscWz67H-88QpXAptZ9O32sIBYeC66InO0jgl6-j0ri2TA3UJBW1NdCs7J8bC0ojHBf25dzIK4c22yhrEaGuOP6SYAP6b0ioBvyMvQlYYmQw9QQm2GcEBTQiVjZPP4NkJOl1Z6VWmQs6gN7DOb_7bhPa7YC7wG9MtGLHCHsWfS1HBHqKD5SAHfssjvknn5RNfVNsyxLwH8SMzBEaSBPyyS-0ESoX8OnFHsCXe3EtI9JO5TWxr1yn7RY) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCJexnsoINzSwXMYk-5uNMTtemq0DfXlgO6rDBRKRCjt5s6ilh8YhJusUMKtYBSFkRmYgN7YgnpuP36WAB3LdHBmPU2tOR5gmW3kuHqN0BA9_VhkEH4CanCr_vdAk4Sns4ICDBoT4-eiEIe8921Np-onGAUpk9ZZ1gi6gEmXoql6tVy5XMtGcKknp4_eDzLS1QjEmv9t3MdfrRRAiP0H90dC0w3K1TzL08tEaPk_5hApcgp-lcaz3gaATC36x4ppVTw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCNOlfqRPkvQnoC0rVgXQEyIhKu61d4ZP7jOYGNcIkopF91o_rWWHMkknTEOav9VPoEEWnDjzDI0aLdar762cEfhOdT_NdZp2aabO2hnO-xkA3hlP7u8rUsUrVk6qGkkUwhgXoj6OWSOzKnPI31y0Cb0VV0mG_5I2GCx5ZWMkg-q-moqPjT7Ar18Qeo2AtuJ0N2oZwY7tD4DQ7RBo3iIUbS9GjKEy_mRDWJHrImnugA_vG_wQtHvGinDS4gNMqxUIag%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCLrA2BTdqKEN6kodPJW6VGlHTpqAf30xHGqI0v1KMxfrEeNEH-bW5erZbS8JR6zD1U6u__-1XQBER4WCL-sl9azEcULA4PvLnar-P-AaHrRDfLEnjBaw_CZhEVCoapH50BcIFud2ebof--F0YQzz5NBheQE86vv--l3Lj0z17Up5PmTuMVb3gE9KBrWBmao0e9CWPtaUnKrxvv8uJzwn5eGILL_dVlabBimd-fumBgvo0yZRzXZeZr5IIoMCaW9Q1g%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=6cF0KRm8ZYkXY7K-5A6LCKV2hFxydKeMI2IsV27Hkb88NbHlXNQe3oQfXm5ETVoui9scH97T7LSu8z42Os3nqZIH90xsNfgPYcc3Vc3OM5-bxaHDFt0HzBtXFDBjmDBBPwsWe5I0-ns1Il8e0t-4bJCMEdHwnex-lYwQ86wkAdcpaWIMwPQGHHwzmudZPMzybGt1SuMqcd3AVSkZ69TQ5X6Y9egBWzso63fESqLf9yxy2Sd1x6m_dpSjDFxUeGVANUvbEDP34ighay9Xkv6iyoLvBitZWtAOluNRH_VZyx4tkqT9400dMOEvD-oCL7NIeNaz4QhzSdYtNbDsuKkrkgZRKHuXWWszPpKsp_rdRtDSR5es9a1XtfxP013xXQbBxhRXVuHjkCffNL-mkVt-_Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=L_qbroz9ntt1zFTbvqlJvjBJkuVeM2m0PLxcmKdCrc_h-QUa2__d3DQo1WaiHN_KbniEsNpGkt3KRHgTn0j-aqC3yhu5-2OXEsharsRk6cdgV5Bhrp6Fx1k5ECtpCwJkfZxsgMI0smxpoywtc0y0kt3c4O6cehYU1RNixlgV10Y_ABpdoinq0udSw2darocc8r80hzGH-Wmxk37kHo9U9YaeEXG62UMJ9sCwKO9XJAxNhpgcXFN_1ewjXoNz2B_Q) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=87edfd0a36a44284a346076d5fcdf9a3&_e=L_qbroz9ntt1zFTbvqlJvjBJkuVeM2m0PLxcmKdCrc_h-QUa2__d3DQo1WaiHN_KbniEsNpGkt3KRHgTn0j-aqC3yhu5-2OXEsharsRk6cdgV5Bhrp6Fx1k5ECtpCwJkfZxsgMI0smxpoywtc0y0kt3c4O6cehYU1RNixlgV10Y_ABpdoinq0udSw2darocc8r80hzGH-Wmxk37kHo9U9YaeEXG62UMJ9sCwKO9XJAxNhpgcXFN_1ewjXoNz2B_Q) to unsubscribe. body:
Friends, we just got some bad news - **a new poll shows us neck and neck in Nevada 's Senate race.**
It's clear: If the election were held today, we could lose.
I don't need to tell you how serious this is. The attacks from D.C. Republicans are taking a toll. And the only way we'll be able to take the lead is if we have the resources to fight back.
So we've set a goal to raise $30,000 by our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight - but we're still falling short. We can't afford to miss this goal and lose this race - and Democrats' best chance to take back the Senate.
**I 'm counting on you to give now to flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate. **[Please give whatever you can right now to help us get back on track.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd46a/4fbb2af3/71b03a30/5e8a376d/4022840054/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azY5MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk690-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Every dollar makes a difference. Thanks for being part of our team.
Jacky

PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd46a/4fbb2af3/71b03a30/5e8a376a/4022840054/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it.
