clean_body: Friends, we just got some bad news - a new poll shows us neck and neck in Nevada 's Senate race. It's clear: If the election were held today, we could lose. I don't need to tell you how serious this is. The attacks from D.C. Republicans are taking a toll. And the only way we'll be able to take the lead is if we have the resources to fight back. So we've set a goal to raise $30,000 by our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight - but we're still falling short. We can't afford to miss this goal and lose this race - and Democrats' best chance to take back the Senate. I 'm counting on you to give now to flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate. ""** Every dollar makes a difference. Thanks for being part of our team. Jacky Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126** | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates. Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please "". If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support.

name: Team Corey
subject: Weekly Update - Stewart leads fundraising and announces Election Night Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=1)
---
Peter -- With only 2 weeks left, Corey Stewart leads all candidates in fundraising with almost $900,000 raised total and more than 8,000 donors, over half of whom are from Virginia. We're running new ads across the Commonwealth, released a new poll, announced the first few events of **Corey's Commonwealth Tour** and his Election Night Party, and we need your help making calls to push Corey across the line. Check out our weekly update and ways you can help below. **WEEKLY VOLUNTEER CONFERENCE CALL**
You're invited to join a conference call with Team Corey every Tuesday night at 8 pm EST. Dial (515) 739-6200 Access code 896695
* * *
**Internal Poll
** The campaign recently conducted an internal poll that we would like to share with all of you first.

* **Stewart leads all other candidates 3 to 1.**
* Stewart 32%, Freitas 9%, Jackson 5%.
* Stewart has a commanding lead with younger voters under the age of 50!
* Stewart 42%, Freitas 11%, Jackson 4%
* Previously undecided voters are moving to Stewart at a better than 5-1 ratio.
* Stewart holds a strong 31-8 favorable/unfavorable with 77% name ID.

Stewart holds a strong lead with two weeks to go and continues to build momentum as he heads toward the finish line. We want to thank all of our great volunteers and donors for helping us get to this point. You can read the full campaign memo [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2FVirginia-Poll-Memo-052118.pdf&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=2).
* * *
**WE NEED YOUR HELP MAKING CALLS!**
It's GOTV time! Let's get calling for Corey and tell everyone to vote on June 12th! To sign up, go to [**www.coreystewart.com/phone**](http://www.coreystewart.com/phone?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=3) or contact your local field representative. All callers should be on ** _Stewart For Senate Outreach \- Lee_** and _**Stewart For Senate Outreach - Clarke.**_ We have 2 big events coming up and we need to get the word out! Here are the scripts: **_Clarke:_** Click [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fdocument%2Fd%2F1TZnri_unYRBYqExlUNXZ7v8RVR_qFtUkyp6Rh7QTNnU%2Fedit%3Fusp%3Dsharing&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=4) **_Lee:_** Click [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fdocument%2Fd%2F15B94Ng4PtkyQLEUn-byM6NbSNOr8Nq4FgItfVDWZ0sc%2Fedit%3Fusp%3Dsharing&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=5)
* * *
**_"I am a fighter and people who know me know I've been a fighter my whole life._****_” - Corey Stewart _**
* * *
**VOLUNTEER OF THE WEEK**
Congratulations to this week's Volunteer of the Week, **Deborah Bittinger**! Deborah has been one of our most valuable team members calling thousands of voters every week and recruiting many volunteers to help the effort during the campaign! Thank you, Deborah!
* * *
**Upcoming Events!** **Stewart Election Night Party
The Electric Palm Restaurant
12745 Sea Ray Ln
Woodbridge, VA 22192
June 12th - Starts at 6:30 PM

* * *
**IN THE NEWS** \--- **Stewart Releases New Ad "Winner" Highlighting His Winning Record While Leading As A Conservative** Entitled "Winner", the ad spotlights Corey Stewart's record of winning in blue Northern Virginia while leading as a conservative cutting taxes, leading the nation's toughest illegal alien crackdown, and being the first in Virginia to protect kids by putting retired cops in schools.

You can watch the video version [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=26), or click on the image below. [](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FCoreyStewartVA%2Fvideos%2F2211081398908688%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=27) On May 23rd, Fairfax will stop cooperating with ICE's request to detain criminal illegal aliens when they have one of the WORST MS-13 problems in the country. Watch Corey's speech below on how to stop it at one of his stops on his **Make Fairfax Safe Tour!** Watch the video [here.](facebook.com/CoreyStewartVA/videos/2217152781634883/) Stewart is by far the strongest candidate on the Second Amendment with a record to back it up.
* * *
**What Corey will fight for in the Senate:**
* _Build the Wall_
* _Cut Taxes and Simplify the Tax Code_
* _Repeal Obamacare and Lower Your Premiums_
* _Revive Manufacturing and Bring Back Jobs_
* _Protect Our History and Heritage_
* _Pass National Concealed Carry Reciprocity_
* _Defund Planned Parenthood_
* _Improve Veterans’ Healthcare_
* _Rebuild the Military_

_See all issues at CoreyStewart.com/issues._
* * *
**Why Corey's the best Candidate to defeat Kaine:******
* _Won 5 times in a blue Northern Virginia County. Only Republican to do so since 2009._
* _Outperforms all Republicans in Northern Virginia_
* _Has the support of the Trump Base._
* _Only countywide elected Republican in Northern Virginia._
* _Won over 75% of counties and cities in Virginia's Southwest, Southside, and Shenandoah Valley regions in 2017 Republican Primary._

**_Stewart unveils Immigration policy_**
* **_Click[here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fcoreystewart%2Fstewartimmigrationpolicy&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=28) to read _**
* _"I pledge to be the strongest advocate in the U.S. Senate on Immigration by fighting tirelessly to implement the following":_
* _Mandating immigration checks of arrests (mandated 287g)_
* _Including the citizenship question on the U.S. Census_
* _Turning Census Bureau information on illegals over to ICE_
* _Arresting and prosecuting sanctuary city officials_
* _Ending Chain Migration_
* _Defunding and ending DACA_
* _Building the Wall - the WHOLE wall._
* _Ending the Visa Lottery_

_**Join our[Grassroots Page](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgroups%2Fgrassrootsforcorey%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=29) on Facebook by clicking [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fgroups%2Fgrassrootsforcorey%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=30) to keep updated daily. **_ Best, Matt Brown
Campaign Manager
mbrown@coreystewart.com Stewart for Senate
[http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate5_29&n=31)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____

name: Ben Jealous
subject: A blue wave is leaving us behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#

Friend --
In a year where we're seeing wave after wave of progressive Democrats win in unlikely places as surprising as Alabama and Georgia, why is Maryland being left behind?
We're a state built on progressive values. We're scrappy, we work hard, and we deserve better leadership than what we have now. But we need the funds to fight for it, and right now, Larry Hogan has $9 million to spend. Just last month, he raised $1 million.
If you want to make Maryland progressive again, it's time to invest in this campaign.
**We're a month out from the primary, and Republicans are hoping we've run out of steam.[ We have an end of May fundraising goal of $25,000 -- can you help us reach it with a grassroots donation of $5 or more right now?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a625/7ab0e2c4/7f8ebe43/349bb9cb/144894979/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05308A")**
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a625/7ab0e2c4/7f8ebe43/349bb9ca/144894979/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=5&refcode=OHQ05308A&express_lane=true")

---

We know it's hard in a crowded primary field to stand out in fundraising -- that's not what we're about anyway.
This campaign is built on the hearts and souls of folks like you. Educators who want better classrooms, working families who want better and safer jobs, and students who want affordable education right here at home.
Your donation doesn't just help us win this primary, it helps us start strong in the general against Larry Hogan. He'll have an advantage -- there's no two ways around it. But we can start to build right now to win not just in June, but in November, too.
[**That's why I'm asking you, from my heart, to invest in this campaign today ahead of tomorrow's fundraising deadline. Donate $5 or more, and let's build a better Maryland together.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a625/7ab0e2c4/7f8ebe43/349bb9cb/144894979/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05308A")

Ben

Hey there --

This month, we learned our opponent would be Trump-backed Republican Scott Wagner.

With special interests gearing up to spend millions in Pennsylvania to help Scott Wagner win, we need to fight harder than ever to re-elect Democratic Governor Tom Wolf.

It's critical that we know how our supporters plan to be involved in this year's election. We need involved supporters across Pennsylvania, and look, we need you to help us better understand 18326 voters.
**[That's why we're asking you to take our NEW Supporter Engagement Survey right away ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd88/73a2bc12/3af60e31/1fcd9437/3856670557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/supporter-engagement-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180530_engage_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180530_engage_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+asking+you+to+t")**

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: time to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends, there are few things I enjoy more than spending time outdoors with my grandkids in New Hampshire's forests.
But these woods contain a deadly threat: Lyme disease, which has _tripled_ nationwide in recent years.
**It 's time to act, to protect every little girl and boy who should be able to play outside without worrying about the grave dangers of tick bites.**
In 2016, Congress passed a bill requiring that the government do more to fight Lyme disease. Yet for no apparent reason, the Trump administration has refused to implement that policy.
The 300,000 Americans who are diagnosed with Lyme every year deserve better. **So please, add your voice to mine by signing this petition today to tell Congress to fund research to stop the spread of Lyme disease.**
****[Add your name right now to tell Congress: Help stop the spread of Lyme disease!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk851-ja-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fcjs-prevent-lyme%3Fcode%3Djtk851-ja-nd)****
Thank you,
Jeanne
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Shaheen for Senate email list, please click here.](http://www.democratsenators.org/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZaPFvQkOxIjipmN9IPDQZeEMaogUFtEG&url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.democratsenators.org%2Fo%2F23%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2F%3FEmail%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

But we have less than a week to make sure that happens. The primary in six days will determine whether Regina advances to the General Election, or whether McClintock gets a lucky break.

name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: things are heating up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
While temperatures climb around Arizona, we're working overtime here at HQ ahead of our first big end-of-month deadline of the summer.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6339b2/1a8421e1/1a416688b/4b4da8bf/577770785/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Team, Things are heating up here in Arizona's First District... both the weather, and this campaign. While temperatures climb around Arizona, we're working overtime here at HQ ahead of our first big end-of-month deadline of the summer. Our finance director, Lindsay, tells me that we need to raise another $2,862 before tomorrow at midnight, or we're going to fall behind our budget. **[We can't afford to fall behind as we head into the summer -- a crucial period of the campaign for getting our message out. Team, can you rush a donation before the deadline to make sure we hit our goal?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.30_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | ****[May deadline: Chip in>>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.30_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

I'm sure you've heard by now that we're on defense going into the summer. **Tom was recently named THE most endangered Democrat _in the entire House_ , and he has several far-right opponents who are lining up to defeat him.**

This is one of the far-right's few blue-to-red pickup opportunities. It's on us to make sure they don't succeed this fall, and with the stakes this high, we're probably going to need to turn the heat up even higher... [**you can help us with a donation before our deadline here.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.30_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Ryan Mulcahy
Campaign Manager

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.05.30_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6339b2/1a8421e1/1a416688b/4b4da8a3/577770785/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

name: David Ortiz
subject: Be there for the first big weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Friend --
Governor Raimondo officially launched the campaign this week and we're kicking things off with our first Weekend of Action! This Saturday, we'll have volunteer trainings and canvass launches in cities and towns all across Rhode Island: **[Will you sign up now for an event near you?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0d7/5e076a9e/5450c679/144263dc/3401031821/VEsH/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/weekend-of-action")**
If you've never helped out on a campaign before, make this weekend your first time. You'll meet great people, have a lot of fun, and make a difference during our first critical weekend of this campaign: **[Click here to RSVP now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0d7/5e076a9e/5450c679/144263dc/3401031821/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/weekend-of-action")**
Studies show that talking with people early in the cycle is crucial to turning out the vote in November -- there's no time to waste. Your active support will help ensure that we are able to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
See you out there,
David
David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager
**P.S.[Don't forget to RSVP now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0d7/5e076a9e/5450c679/144263dc/3401031821/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/weekend-of-action")**

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0d7/5e076a9e/5450c679/144263df/3401031821/VEsC/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I believe...
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3063/9e00690/47b14b2e/2402318c/323656343/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&source=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG")
Hello --

I didn't decide to run for Governor because I like seeing my name on signs or because I grew up wanting to be a politician.

I've always believed that people should run hard on the issues that matter to our communities. I got into public service to make a difference in people's lives. And I decided to run for Governor because I knew we could rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us, and it was going to take the right leader to help do it.

I believe in fighting for what's right, and I truly believe I am the right person to help fix the mess Rick Scott is leaving behind -- but I need your help.

**[We have a critical fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow. Can I count on you to chip in $5 now to help make sure we hit our goal?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3063/9e00690/47b14b2e/2402318f/323656343/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+We+have+a+critical+fundraising+deadline+")**

I know that every Floridian deserves access to quality, affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs to support their families, and our teachers and staff deserve to be paid more than what they are. These aren't radical ideas, but I'm the only candidate who has laid out plans to make them happen.

We can do better for our state and for future generations -- and we can start by electing a true progressive to the Governor's Mansion.

**[I believe that we will win. So please, chip in $5 before our fundraising deadline tomorrow night to help make it happen.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3063/9e00690/47b14b2e/2402318e/323656343/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+I+believe+that+we+will+win+So+please+chi")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3063/9e00690/47b14b2e/24023181/323656343/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-eom?gpsid=13_55_758&refcode=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180530_EOM2_fnd_gq_nono__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

clean_body: "" Hello -- I didn't decide to run for Governor because I like seeing my name on signs or because I grew up wanting to be a politician. I've always believed that people should run hard on the issues that matter to our communities. I got into public service to make a difference in people's lives. And I decided to run for Governor because I knew we could rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us, and it was going to take the right leader to help do it. I believe in fighting for what's right, and I truly believe I am the right person to help fix the mess Rick Scott is leaving behind -- but I need your help. "+" I know that every Floridian deserves access to quality, affordable healthcare, good-paying jobs to support their families, and our teachers and staff deserve to be paid more than what they are. These aren't radical ideas, but I'm the only candidate who has laid out plans to make them happen. We can do better for our state and for future generations -- and we can start by electing a true progressive to the Governor's Mansion. "" Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Liz Brown
subject: help out my dad and get a bumper sticker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Donald Trump and Republicans in control of Congress have tried, repeatedly, to defund Planned Parenthood and to make it harder for women to access the care they deserve. They don't understand that women should have the freedom to make personal, private health decisions with their doctors, not their politicians. **But my dad does.** Every step of the way, he's fighting to make sure that their efforts are unsuccessful. With everything at stake this year, it's incredibly important to keep him fighting on behalf of women and families across this country. This month's goal is the biggest one yet. And dad's falling behind at a time when the polls aren't looking too good. So let's make a deal. [_**If you make a contribution, even if it 's just $5 to my dad, we'll send you one of our official Women for Sherrod bumper stickers.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad9/4462dc26/53e25551/2007eea0/3109608677/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMweiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530z?refcode=sbe180530z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") | [](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad9/4462dc26/53e25551/2007eea0/3109608677/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMweiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530z?refcode=sbe180530z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
This way you can show your support for my dad, help him hit this goal, and be the reason we have a fighter in our corner in the U.S. Senate.
Our country has made a lot of progress in terms of women's rights and women's health. We can't let Donald Trump or Republicans undo that progress.
Which is why we need my dad to win this year. He'll keep them in check and build on that progress.
[_**So rush in a donation and claim your bumper sticker!**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad9/4462dc26/53e25551/2007eea0/3109608677/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMweiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530z?refcode=sbe180530z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
| | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffad9/4462dc26/53e25551/2007eea0/3109608677/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNTMweiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180530z?refcode=sbe180530z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Thank you for hearing me out and helping out my dad,
Liz Brown

|

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Your status update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Jay needs you now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7904d/2f5ea88d/713fc4c7/2cbcc22a/1768103005/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-4-control-nd&utm_medium=ema") It's coming down to the wire friend, -- and Jay needs you. So does Washington. So does this movement. | Days until May 31 Deadline: | 1
---|---
Email Address: | [dpwillis67@gmail.com]()
Date of Last Contribution: | Not yet contributed

[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7904d/2f5ea88d/713fc4c7/2cbcc22a/1768103005/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-4-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
---
With just two days until the end of May deadline, I want to make sure you know why we're asking, now, for help.
We're at a pivotal moment for our progressive movement. We're up against a president who is creating a culture of chaos and corruption in the other Washington -- the same president who blithely promised to drain the swamp.
We're facing down a Congress hell-bent on passing an extreme agenda that attacks a woman's right to make her own reproductive health choices, takes billions away from Medicare, guts affordable health care, and turns a blind eye to this administration's assaults on our environment.
We need to grow Governor Inslee's ability to show progressive strength in the face of these unprecedented challenges -- and we need to do it now.
Our team has an ambitious goal of $30,000 by midnight tomorrow. Don't let Jay down -- we need you to chip in now.
[**Will you contribute $10 today?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7904d/2f5ea88d/713fc4c7/2cbcc22a/1768103005/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-of-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&refcode=ema_2018-05-30_eom-4-control-nd&utm_campaign=eom-4-control-nd&utm_medium=ema")
Thank you,
Tracy Newman
**P.S. The clock is ticking -- chip in before it's too late:**

We're at a pivotal moment for our progressive movement. We're up against a president who is creating a culture of chaos and corruption in the other Washington -- the same president who blithely promised to drain the swamp. We're facing down a Congress hell-bent on passing an extreme agenda that attacks a woman's right to make her own reproductive health choices, takes billions away from Medicare, guts affordable health care, and turns a blind eye to this administration's assaults on our environment. We need to grow Governor Inslee's ability to show progressive strength in the face of these unprecedented challenges -- and we need to do it now. Our team has an ambitious goal of $30,000 by midnight tomorrow. Don't let Jay down -- we need you to chip in now. "" Thank you, Tracy Newman P.S. The clock is ticking -- chip in before it's too late: "" ""

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: a difference in people’s lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Friend,

This email has a lot of information about what I’ve been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it. **[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I’m working to earn it.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2hw/esfoTgtpSweuos52BocSYw/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpwFLSNOvaD7fnXIgFtAC2dRzq1-2FKIl5k3AkHl2eI6MW-2F9PBJi4C9pktpnCYD0crBbW4SlpzDr9-2Bl8xFTcE3ibYlfk5Rri-2BwnD3lLKjXfbcTnu1A-2FrOmsqw8jsKau62lCJWUsH2yCY9xP788VkuWNjeAXCEMDE31a-2BmqrAckW48T3uXaexN1CJ-2BSNOwokVKGjcfZL82Pv3ZW1zSIX-2FsL8BPkEeGk2mwxYf4g9WJ0YiPramYpUcTUjPZYm4jNocHutxwZUhGDdxZN5E1SRmPDPM-2BKZUou-2FzxXDWSj38Adazifu4X598NFp7gUoRrFCuyTqT) **

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump’s scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn’t detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**Earlier this month, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can’t overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats.** Many said our bill wouldn’t go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

**We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts.** The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I’m proud we’ve cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

**And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don’t lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don’t warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people’s lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn’t happen, we need to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal by bringing in $20,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the deadline?**

**[Your contribution will power my efforts to continue fighting not only for New Mexican values, but for our nation’s.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/BgE/ni0YAA/t.2hw/esfoTgtpSweuos52BocSYw/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVFLarG9lvvLmQ192R5PFFMpwFLSNOvaD7fnXIgFtAC2dRzq1-2FKIl5k3AkHl2eI6MW-2F9PBJi4C9pktpnCYD0crBbW4SlpzDr9-2Bl8xFTcE3ibYlfk5Rri-2BwnD3lLKjXfbcTldV9Wh9I-2BohYPXgAZ1XyCkmNg37bzI8zzfqN9L26gbCIpcqdIJXgfo2cgaG6-2BYr8CepnZW69YbSQTRJtSaB-2BObgBVgJqCrO8c4xcn0nPLi-2BvSBxP8VNXKwH99PJoYhTreiJjItyikF3l9tPBvkfklQSWzawgonOTA8vtG4O0kmKx-2BB-2B9H0XZwdD1J0kF70unxTUhTRb3PBpwtmvXRa1GJT)**

name: Laura, Bredesen 2018
subject: Koch brothers spending in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter, it’s finally started:
Over the holiday weekend, a dark money group funded by the Koch brothers launched a series of ads in support of our opponent as they ramp up their attacks on Governor Bredesen.
With recent polls showing our continued momentum, it is clear that our campaign’s message is resonating with Tennessee voters. But that momentum has caught the attention of mega-donors like the Kochs and the partisan Washington establishment.
They didn’t think a campaign focused on bringing people together instead of picking up partisan points could get ahead in this election cycle. And now you’re proving them wrong. **Simply put, they’re scared of Tennessee.**
We can’t afford to let out-of-state special interests and mega-donors like the Kochs buy this race -- we have a major fundraising deadline this week, and we need your help to keep pushing ahead:
[**Can you donate $15 or whatever you can to our campaign? Donations from grassroots supporters like you are a big part of why we’re ahead, but we know outside mega-donors are spending dark money in this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1309834/7186665/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY2NjM2Mi02MTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXifNuHj2gVEr7XXAA9-LWNq0XsoWEe90lqfmIGtgJk=&refcode=em180530-eom2-full&emci=a3d9862f-5764-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=d1666362-6164-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1309835/7186666/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY2NjM2Mi02MTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXifNuHj2gVEr7XXAA9-LWNq0XsoWEe90lqfmIGtgJk=&refcode=em180530-eom2-full&emci=a3d9862f-5764-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=d1666362-6164-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)**
We already knew that in the next few months, mega-donors and dark money groups would be pouring millions of dollars into this race: taking up air time, filling up your mailboxes, and cluttering your newsfeeds with the same toxic rancor that’s created gridlock and chaos in Washington.
**But they are starting to pour money and misinformation early.**
That’s why fundraising deadlines like this week’s are so critical to our campaign. With grassroots donations powering us, we’ve been able to tune out the noise of Washington politics and stay focused on issues that matter to Tennesseans like you.
[**So can we count on you to add a $15 contribution before our deadline? We’re relying on supporters like you to power this campaign, not mega-donors or Washington special interests.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1309836/7186667/1753065809?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY2NjM2Mi02MTY0LWU4MTEtODBjMy0wMDE1NWRjMzM3N2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tXifNuHj2gVEr7XXAA9-LWNq0XsoWEe90lqfmIGtgJk=&refcode=em180530-eom2-full&emci=a3d9862f-5764-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&emdi=d1666362-6164-e811-80c3-00155dc3377a&ceid=2454445&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=)

**On May 18th I was honored to attend a Polk County Teen Democrats event in Columbus. Emily Hogan, our Polk County Ambassador, was the lead organizer of the party and most of Polk County’s Democratic candidates for local offices attended as well. Emily is graduating from high school next week, and she has been instrumental in engaging young people in our political process. The horror of recent school violence shows us the urgency in which a change in direction of Washington is sorely needed. The passion, creativity, and intellectual curiosity of these newest voters are most important resources in finding our new road forward. The enthusiastic support of these young adults for my campaign is both exciting and humbling.**

clean_body: | | | | On May 18th I was honored to attend a Polk County Teen Democrats event in Columbus. Emily Hogan, our Polk County Ambassador, was the lead organizer of the party and most of Polk County’s Democratic candidates for local offices attended as well. Emily is graduating from high school next week, and she has been instrumental in engaging young people in our political process. The horror of recent school violence shows us the urgency in which a change in direction of Washington is sorely needed. The passion, creativity, and intellectual curiosity of these newest voters are most important resources in finding our new road forward. The enthusiastic support of these young adults for my campaign is both exciting and humbling. Paragraph #2 | | | | Paragraph #3 | | Paragraph #4 PO Box 351 Mc Adenville NC 28101 USA |

body:
The team sent over this message earlier today, and we wanted to circle back for two reasons: first, your top issues from the survey are included, and, second, Dan has a critical fundraising deadline tomorrow.

[**We need your help to keep fighting in Congress. Can you chip in here to help us hit our goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhUV6lJZKD79ySHT_YEazkEa7uVjtJqVwDoTh60FTy0=/OJxrcUdxRu6XhUZSa5Dqo9yK5x52ijPqexgsDa8zD1s=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_2_2&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

**Begin forwarded message:**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhUV6lJZKD79ySHT_YEazkEa7uVjtJqVwDoTh60FTy0=/OJxrcUdxRu6XhUZSa5Dqo9yK5x52ijPqexgsDa8zD1s=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_2_2&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Peter,

We recently surveyed our grassroots supporters to find out which issues are most important to them. First, a huge thank you to everyone who participated.

**We learned that _fighting climate change_ , _improving our educational system_ , and _supporting seniors_ are at the very top of supporters' lists.**

**Dan has been a breakaway leader on ALL THREE of these key issues for over a decade!**

His work has led to the protection and restoration of local lands and waters, pushed critical environmental regulations and climate-change responses to new heights, strengthened Illinois schools, and gave seniors the security they needed and deserved.

[**But right now, he needs your help to continue that critical work! Will you make a contribution to Dan 's campaign right now, before the deadline tonight at midnight? We need to raise $9,500 to keep our fundraising on track, and we still have over $7k to go.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhUV6lJZKD79ySHT_YEazkEa7uVjtJqVwDoTh60FTy0=/OJxrcUdxRu6XhUZSa5Dqo9yK5x52ijPqexgsDa8zD1s=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_2_2&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Probably our biggest surprise from the survey was learning that most people aren't aware that Dan's opponent, Art Jones, is a Holocaust denier.

Jones is a proud neo-Nazi and white supremacist, and he doesn't hide his belief in dangerous, despicable and racist ideologies. He's running to advance the white-supremacist agenda. As the head of the Illinois Republican Party said, Jones "is a Nazi whose disgusting, bigoted views have no place in our nation's discourse."

With your support now, we can get our positive message out to voters, share the work that Dan has done for Illinois, and send a strong warning about who our opponent really is.

[**Click here to give and help us reach this important goal. We have only 48 more hours to raise $9,500, so please act fast!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhUV6lJZKD79ySHT_YEazkEa7uVjtJqVwDoTh60FTy0=/OJxrcUdxRu6XhUZSa5Dqo9yK5x52ijPqexgsDa8zD1s=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_2_2&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks,

Team Lipinski

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/xhUV6lJZKD79ySHT_YEazkEa7uVjtJqVwDoTh60FTy0=/OJxrcUdxRu6XhUZSa5Dqo9yK5x52ijPqexgsDa8zD1s=?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180530_2_2&amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: No-Wall Border = Somali Terrorists, America's Drug Crisis, Sanctuary Cities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=52db89b83e&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **Peter,**

**We would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan or Iraq than we are bordering Mexico. **

The border wall is not just an immigration discussion -- the border wall is a matter of national security.

**_There is a war going on in Mexico and nobody is talking about it._ **Fake news ignores it, big government downplays it, and we the people stand to suffer and die for it each and every day.

Drugs, Disease, MS-13 gangs, violent criminals, anti-American fervor, Somalians and Sharia law. I've seen these scourges on the ground for myself when I worked out of the US Embassy in Panama, our borders wide open stands as a continued welcoming mat for these societal disasters. Our wide-open southern border is a cultural and national security disaster. We pay the price for it every day that we do not have a wall to shield us from the chaos that is Mexico and its out of control drug war and we invite radical terrorist cells to continue to smuggle their way into our midst.

**Don't take my word for it. See for yourself:**
* 23,000 violent deaths in Mexico in 2016: [Mexico is the second most violent country in the world, second only to war-torn Syria](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=522b2ba199&e=9da9b0ca31).
* [99.8% of illegal drugs in the US come from Mexico](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=1d69690da8&e=9da9b0ca31).
* [Opioids killed 63,632](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=746497312d&e=9da9b0ca31) Americans in 2016 and the opioids come from Mexico. [Mexico is the supplier and source of America's opioid crisis.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=1b14a77dce&e=9da9b0ca31)
* [Known Islamic terror cells known as al-Shabab crossing the southern border as "Somali refugees](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e4c87f16fb&e=9da9b0ca31)" -- creating a network by which to smuggle across our wide-open southern border suicide bombers and Islamic terrorists into the US. The government has tried to keep this from the public.

_

Meanwhile, democrats and their sanctuary cities insist that we pay $96 BILLION a year to accommodate illegal immigrants and refugees _flooding our southern border. Democrats also insist that we cannot afford to spend $20 billion ONCE for a wall for our southern border and that protecting our borders is "un-American."

Liberals forfeit time and again their voices in this matter. San Francisco _set free_ an illegal Mexican criminal who shot dead young American Kate Steinle. Today liberals cheer the fact that [Steinle's murderer Garcia Zarate is now SUING the American people for being "unfair and vindictive"](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=92561ed512&e=9da9b0ca31) simply because he shot to death a young American. This is sheer madness.

We cannot keep sending men and women to Washington who do not fully understand the nature and insanity of having an open border with Mexico.

It is not "un-American" to build a wall and protect our children from the likes of Garcia Zarate and millions of pounds of heroin, meth, cocaine, and marijuana that flood our borders each year and destroy our families and children. It is not "un-American" to say that we do not want our country to become a third-world dumping ground for people who refuse to assimilate in our communities. It IS "un-American" to stand by and take this.

When do we say enough? When do we say we are sick of headlines of illegal aliens murdering Americans, burning our flags and demanding "amnesty?" [Burning 3 year olds alive?](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=596159f360&e=9da9b0ca31) 70,000 more deaths from drug overdose? [Dousing classmates in gasoline and setting them ablaze?](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=cb06bcd1da&e=9da9b0ca31) [Sharia Law creeping into our communities mutilating young girls ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=5c385d867c&e=9da9b0ca31), spreading radical Islam? [Known Islamist terrorist groups entering America under our radar?](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=e4c87f16fb&e=9da9b0ca31)

**All this made possible because we refuse to protect and close down our southern border with Mexico.**

**When does this madness stop?**

BUILDING A WALL, SECURING OUR SOUTHERN BORDER IS A START. And it will happen only by supporting Pro-Wall candidates right now.

_**Tell congress that you support building a wall for our national defense, for our families, for our futures. Send Senators like me who will make building the wall a personal mission -- because we've had enough. We do not have to take it anymore.**_

I need your help. Stand with me on this. I am fighting for all of us.
Courtland Sykes
---

name: Team Hawley
subject: Fwd: Missouri Right to Life Federal PAC Endorses Josh Hawley for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Josh has received the endorsement of Missouri Right to Life Hello Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw the news that Josh has received the endorsement of Missouri Right to Life \- the Missouri affiliate of the National Right to Life organization. Josh has long been a leader on this issue and has worked tirelessly to protect the unborn - in Missouri and throughout the nation. **He will continue this critical work as our next Senator. Please share this news with every conservative you know!** Thank you for your support. Team Hawley [ DONATE TODAY ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=849de9ce59e848e6a30a944304b54224&_e=oX6A6oIElS-sOeh71Kukn9ri8-REc0XroJ6X401RfDMwmbwv6MhlimR0DD-rTb-LNyhRfQVl5De1v110355lcv2qfF_FwbnTg8WO4im0R5hOCznvr14UcU2kzAcoB-x3EKlnpK8773IFUPiwsug6cRCo3Jvgdfp_y2U6BIz9Z3oSiDQwiyv0vp4smY0IiRqMs6AKzY39S9Lrs4SQV2VWpkuX6VoVYVCDLQn2p062yTImYU25Lv1OWlnnxVgeaFYo01DK1CxDqW3qBLkP0eNIlXGQqmpKUHU3TTxSRpZwQLDtXTYA8kKEr09Z5_wxViaVNZ0yjd0HiFp1Cd3gLpo_kquzhBH8wOKOauUKp55cp_MbTLHfHdSW8OeJM4z9meGXSY0TVOeRh980IvaImXhuxA%3D%3D) **From** : Kelli Ford**To** : Team Email**Subject** : Josh has received the endorsement of Missouri Right to Life**Date** : May 30, 2018 Missouri Right to Life Federal PAC Endorses Josh Hawley for U.S. Senate SPRINGFIELD, Mo. – Today, Missouri Right to Life (MRL) Federal PAC endorsed Josh Hawley for U.S. Senate.

Josh Hawley said, “Our nation’s laws and policies should protect the innocent and defend the most vulnerable among us. We have a duty to speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves. The future of our state and our nation depend on it.

“It really shouldn’t take political courage to stand up for innocent human life, but we have people in D.C. right now who are supporting extreme positions. And one of those Senators wants Missouri to re-elect her this fall. That’s why we need to keep fighting for life and that’s what I will do as Senator. Together we are a force – we must continue to defend the defenseless and help promote a culture of life throughout our great nation.”

MRL Executive Director Susan Klein said, “Josh is a proven pro-life candidate. Because of Josh’s work to protect unborn babies and women, his stand for life when he wasn’t in elected office, and his commitment to stand for the truth even when times are tough, which is what it takes to be truly pro-life, it is an honor for our Missouri Right to Life Federal Political Action Committee to give a single endorsement to Josh for the August primary and November general election for Josh to become our next U.S. Senator.”

Missouri Right to Life Federal PAC is part of the Missouri Right to Life, which is an affiliate of the National Right to Life organization. | [ ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=849de9ce59e848e6a30a944304b54224&_e=oX6A6oIElS-sOeh71KuknxxE__ldfYloZUt_oujJJRBWC_YD189MVVebj-oec5EXWkIiLdVG3ysJG-Z9bR8BUSsf1TzbwTYm8JRjS3kVX3iqNQKEyn_ddbb_nYEz9ZKuOq-CFoWcYUabe3wNI5HhNVo9aDn79_9AqQDkTcagx5PehfFMmEaNmMLEiKqnoWnGxV0iy4_3vVeCqnzQjexoXfiugZW4ugY-XeLoiJWzPkLMI9D1Xg_ifPrUZCZZv3DIAkAhw8SyaPV7T2k1WTU6VytL3hIzV8I4wbwucUyTpP9kV32xPOcAlJehIRTpEc6zvmqEscYattskjKDcRHt3WwaQPZmVeFOz1L0GGfzb5yQ%3D "Facebook")

name: Jennifer Granholm
subject: I was governor during the auto industry crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
I remember how Michiganders felt during the auto industry crisis when I was governor. It was not easy.
---
I remember how Michiganders felt during the auto industry crisis. It was not easy, Derek.

As governor, I talked with hardworking families in factory towns. They'd been loyal to those companies for generations and those families all had one thing in common: They felt left behind.

It's similar to how folks feel now -- the American people want a government that works for them. They want jobs that pay a living wage. But instead, this president and Republicans in Congress are pretending middle-class Americans' problems can be solved by building a wall (all while greasing the tracks for the rich).

It's time to elect Democrats who will present real solutions to the problems facing the American people. Tomorrow at midnight is a critical fundraising deadline -- and your support will help build the national organizing effort it will take to win in November.

**Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to help elect Democrats nationwide?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e101/2037998851/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jg-may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10e/2037998851/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jg-may-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10f/2037998851/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jg-may-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10c/2037998851/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jg-may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10d/2037998851/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jg-may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10a/2037998851/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")
** Even though our country spans an entire continent, we are all connected to each other no matter the city or town we call home. So when Flint's water is poisoning children and families, it hurts all of us. Or when an autoworker in Detroit learns how to build an electric vehicle, we all win.

**If Democrats take back Congress in November, we can work together to solve problems Americans are facing in Virginia and across the country. That's why this deadline is so critical.**

**[Chip in $3 to help elect Democrats in all 50 states who can move our country forward.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522ee7/4067b0a/5b7938d1d/7fb9e10b/2037998851/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+3++if+consinConsGroup29583+again&utm_campaign=em_20180530_jg_nd&source=em_20180530_jg_nd&refcode=em_20180530_jg_nd")**

It takes a village -- thank you for being a part of it.

Jennifer

Jennifer Granholm
47th Governor of Michigan

clean_body: I remember how Michiganders felt during the auto industry crisis when I was governor. It was not easy. I remember how Michiganders felt during the auto industry crisis. It was not easy, Derek. As governor, I talked with hardworking families in factory towns. They'd been loyal to those companies for generations and those families all had one thing in common: They felt left behind. It's similar to how folks feel now -- the American people want a government that works for them. They want jobs that pay a living wage. But instead, this president and Republicans in Congress are pretending middle-class Americans' problems can be solved by building a wall (all while greasing the tracks for the rich). It's time to elect Democrats who will present real solutions to the problems facing the American people. Tomorrow at midnight is a critical fundraising deadline -- and your support will help build the national organizing effort it will take to win in November. Will you make your first $3 donation of 2018 before tomorrow's deadline to help elect Democrats nationwide? "" "" "" "" "" "" Even though our country spans an entire continent, we are all connected to each other no matter the city or town we call home. So when Flint's water is poisoning children and families, it hurts all of us. Or when an autoworker in Detroit learns how to build an electric vehicle, we all win. If Democrats take back Congress in November, we can work together to solve problems Americans are facing in Virginia and across the country. That's why this deadline is so critical. "" It takes a village -- thank you for being a part of it. Jennifer Jennifer Granholm 47th Governor of Michigan Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: DWB for Congress
subject: DWB's Campaign Update, Take 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Elect David Wilson Brown
body:
| | Apologies for the errors in our previous message.
---
| | | [ ](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=UKfrpHdzrAo3fHGYtmPtIg)
---
**We are off and running!**
| | **On May 18th I was honored to attend a Polk County Teen Democrats event in Columbus. Emily Hogan, our Polk County Ambassador, was the lead organizer of the party. She is graduating from high school next week, and she has been instrumental in engaging young people in our political process. The horror of recent school violence shows us the urgency in which a change in direction of Washington is sorely needed. The passion, creativity, and intellectual curiosity of these newest voters are most important resources in finding our new road forward. The enthusiastic support of these young adults for my campaign is both exciting and humbling. **

---
| [ ](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=UKfrpHdzrAo3fHGYtmPtIg)
---

A Warm Welcome to Jarvis Johnson
**I am proud to announce that Jarvis Johnson will be joining our growing team as ou r new****Field Director. Jarvis has extensive experience working on political campaigns dating back to 2008 and is a most welcome addition to our rapidly growing campaign staff. He last worked for the very popular and forward-leaning NC Senator, Jeff Jackson, who represents District 37 in Mecklenburg County.******
****
****
| [ ](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=UKfrpHdzrAo3fHGYtmPtIg)
---
**I hope you will join us on Sunday, June 3rd, at Carrier Park for our family-friendly kick-off event to “Flip the 10th District!” I look forward to the opportunity to meet with you and listen to your concerns. Phillip Price, our 11th district nominee, will also make a guest appearance. Light refreshments will be available and better yet, dogs are encouraged to attend. In the event of continued flooding at Carrier Park, check our [FB events page](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=hvMTtQ4EXSHlwme6G_WZlQ) to see our new event location.**

**Taking on the corporate giants**
**Up to this point our campaign has been supported by a core of engaged and dedicated volunteers, and they have performed admirably. As we know, Patrick McHenry’s campaign has deep pockets, given his connections to his wealthy corporate donors. We are up against one of the most powerful men in Washington. Even so, I remain committed to keeping this campaign a grassroots effort, and I have not received nor solicited any PAC monies. Any donations, large or small, will help us win this fight. Your contributions to our rapidly growing campaign will be appreciated more than you will ever know. Today is my 44th birthday, and I'd be so thrilled if my supporters **

**donated $44 to my campaign TODAY!**
| | [Donate!](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=YvfRX3b5NhqO0myBJkBjBA)
---
Thank you!

David
May 30, 2018

|
---
Paid for by The Committee to Elect David Wilson Brown
To learn more about David Wilson Brown, [click here to visit his website](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=g.k0pCeY9yUjRo6&b=UKfrpHdzrAo3fHGYtmPtIg).

PO Box 351
Mc Adenville NC 28101
USA

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Someone's best Budd, but not yours
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests
body:
Ted Budd is supposed to serve the people of North Carolina's 13th Congressional District.

Instead, he spends his time doing the bidding of special interests.

In a recent example of Rep. Budd's misplaced priorities, he is leading the charge to repeal consumer protections for working families against payday lenders (these types of predatory lending practices are actually illegal in North Carolina). These payday lenders prey on members of our military, seniors, and working families living paycheck to paycheck.

This is just more proof that Rep. Ted Budd needs to go. Make sure we have the resources to get Kathy elected -- give $5, $10, or more toward our $25,000 May goal.

Why would Rep. Budd choose payday lenders over North Carolina families? It might have something to do with the thousands of dollars in campaign contributions he's received from them.

Rep. Ted Budd is bought and paid for by special interests. We know who calls the shots with him.

That's why Kathy has taken a pledge to not take corporate PAC contributions. She's not going to be beholden to special interests in Congress. She's going to answer to North Carolinians.

There were plenty of people who didn't think we could make this a competitive race. They thought Budd was too entrenched, the district was too gerrymandered, there were too many outside interests stacked against us.

But they were wrong. And we're continuing to show them every day, bit by bit, exactly how wrong they were. The people in this district are fed up with a representative who doesn't represent them.

Together, we've built a campaign positioned for success. From making phone calls to grassroots contributions, you've been with us from the beginning and we're in this together: you, Kathy, me, our grassroots volunteers and supporters, and the hundreds of thousands of North Carolinians who are counting on us.

Make no mistake -- if we keep pushing, we can win in November. But we can't let up for a single second.

Missing goals is not an option. We only have another 72 hours to reach this one, so don't wait any longer. Give what you can.

Thanks!

Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress

*** Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress ***

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to unsubscribe: https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe

www.kathymanning2018.com

subject: we're the epicenter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:

| Team -- Florida is truly the epicenter of the midterm elections.

We have the most competitive Senate race in the country, and Rick Scott is already showing he'll do whatever it takes to buy his way into the Senate this year.

We also have an open governor's mansion, and Trump is already picking favorites in the Republican primary.

_And_ we have competitive House and legislative races statewide! It's all hands on deck to make sure we win this November, which is why we need your help.

[**We 're less than 100 days out from the primary, and things are getting serious. That's why we still need to raise thousands before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow. name: Erica Bernstein
subject: Is this right, will you check?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
We need you now!

I won't lie to you right now -- this fundraising deadline has me nervous
As Ben's Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we have the funds on hand to win. We have ads to run, campaign materials to print, doors to knock, and all of it requires we have the money to make a plan.
You've supported him this far, but you haven't donated before our end-of-month deadline. We have to raise $25,000 to start the sprint to the primary, so will you just let us know if we have the right information?
**Supporter ID: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Ben Jealous donor:** No, not yet
**Chipped in this week?:** Not yet
**Suggested action:[ Donate $5 or more now today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63b/7ab0e2c4/7f894d6b/349bb529/3442677793/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05308B")**
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63b/7ab0e2c4/7f894d6b/349bb528/3442677793/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=5&refcode=OHQ05308B&express_lane=true")

---

---

---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63b/7ab0e2c4/7f894d6b/349bb514/3442677793/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?amount=250&refcode=OHQ05308B&express_lane=true")
---

---
We know that many Maryland voters haven't decided who they're voting for next month -- that means we have to go all out between now and June 26th to let them know who we are and what Ben's all about.
I know you probably hear a lot about a blue wave in 2018, but what if that blue wave leaves Maryland behind? Larry Hogan has $9 million on hand right now to spend to win in November. We need the strongest possible candidate to beat him -- we know that's Ben. But we have to make sure we win now, too.
[**Donate $5 or more right now to help us raise $25,000 before tomorrow night -- and let's win this thing!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a63b/7ab0e2c4/7f894d6b/349bb529/3442677793/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-eom-may18?refcode=OHQ05308B")
Thanks,
Erica

name: Donna Edwards
subject: This campaign is about you
body:
|

| | Hi , From the very beginning, I made a promise that I would not accept donations from big developers who priorities their profits over the people of Prince George's County--and I have kept that promise. I'll be honest with you - this is a very close election, and the path to victory is not an easy one.**My campaign relies on the grassroots support of people like you. In the weeks leading up to the Primary, I need that support more than ever.[Can you make a contribution of $10 or more by midnight?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2c/767134fb/5f74cf72/433838ec/1570723106/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** My campaign for County Executive has always been about you--the hard-working people and families who call Prince George's County their home. As County Executive, I will deliver by improving education, creating an innovative economy, focusing development to create opportunities for all Prince Georgians, and ensuring that big developers pay their fair share. I cannot make this vision a reality without you.[**If you want a County Executive who will put working people and their families first, show your support by making a contribution of $10 or more by midnight tonight. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2c/767134fb/5f74cf72/433838ec/1570723106/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") Thank you very much for your support. Together, we have the power to build a stronger Prince George's County. Donna Edwards

name: Tim Kaine HQ
subject: Re: polls (they're closer than we thought)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, let's start with the bad news. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13c4/3e0906/67601bad/3e34dc3a/686319127/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&source=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, let's start with the bad news.

**Bad news:** We knew this race wasn't going to be easy, but we didn't expect Republicans to gain so much ground so quickly. Right now, they're polling just _three points_ behind Tim Kaine - and that gap is sure to get even tighter between now and November.

**Good news:** We're on our way to an incredible grassroots accomplishment, $100,000 raised in just one month!

Right now, Republicans are relying on the belief that Democrats will take this election for granted. **But we aren 't taking _anything_ for granted, and reaching this goal will help us make sure the GOP hears that message loud and clear. **

We're so close to hitting our goal, but time is running out fast: We're $11,000 behind, and May ends [tomorrow!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13c4/3e0906/67601bad/3e34dc39/686319127/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&source=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3") [Chip in any amount right now to help us over the finish line >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13c4/3e0906/67601bad/3e34dc38/686319127/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?refcode=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+any+amount+right+now+to+help+us+&utm_campaign=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&source=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3")

We set a goal to raise $100,000 this month in order to prove that Team Kaine is willing to step up in this election - because we know you won't sit on the sidelines and let Republicans undo all the progress we've made.

And we're going to do it _our_ way - with small dollar donations that value every single amount donated, _down to the dime._

**Show the GOP they 're wrong about this race, and help make sure that three points behind is the closest Republicans get in the polls:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13c4/3e0906/67601bad/3e34dc3f/686319127/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-may-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3_express_lane_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3&source=20180530_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-3")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. clean_body: Derek, let's start with the bad news. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | "" | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, let's start with the bad news. Bad news: We knew this race wasn't going to be easy, but we didn't expect Republicans to gain so much ground so quickly. Right now, they're polling just three points behind Tim Kaine - and that gap is sure to get even tighter between now and November. Good news: We're on our way to an incredible grassroots accomplishment, $100,000 raised in just one month! Right now, Republicans are relying on the belief that Democrats will take this election for granted. But we aren 't taking anything for granted, and reaching this goal will help us make sure the GOP hears that message loud and clear. We're so close to hitting our goal, but time is running out fast: We're $11,000 behind, and May ends "" "" We set a goal to raise $100,000 this month in order to prove that Team Kaine is willing to step up in this election - because we know you won't sit on the sidelines and let Republicans undo all the progress we've made. And we're going to do it our way - with small dollar donations that value every single amount donated, down to the dime. Show the GOP they 're wrong about this race, and help make sure that three points behind is the closest Republicans get in the polls: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks, Team Kaine "" | "" "" ""

**This is a make-or-break moment, friends.**
**CNN _ _ says the Senate majority is in play, and Democrats only need to flip TWO seats to take back the Senate.**
Everyone from Nate Silver to _The Washington Post_ says**our best path to a Senate majority runs straight through Nevada** : But a recent poll shows this critical race is _deadlocked - _and a pro-Trump Super PAC has announced it's going to spend **$100 million** to win Senate seats like Nevada.
If you want Democrats to take back the Senate, we're counting on you to step up with a donation immediately. **But time is running out ahead of our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight, and right now we're falling very short of the resources we need to win. **

We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.
